'''A. W. Bruna''' is a publishing company that printed the earliest [[Wikipedia:Dutch language|Dutch]] translations of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' novels. [[J. M. Meulenhoff]] and [[Uitgeverij M]] eventually took over the publication of ''Star Wars'' books in the [[Wikipedia:Netherlands|Netherlands]].

{{Company-stub|real}}
